post:
$BMI "Heads up alert! Upcoming earnings on Tuesday, 10/21/2025 for $BMI 
Neutral (5.8) 
 
--- 
Financial Analysis Summary: 
Badger Meter, Inc. 
(BMI) has experienced a volatile period in recent months, with the stock price declining approximately 28% over the past three months. 
Despite this, the company's fundamentals remain robust. 
The P/E ratio currently stands at a competitive level compared to its peers in the Instruments-Control industry, suggesting that the stock might be undervalued given its growth potential in smart water solutions and industrial automation trends. 
The company has shown consistent earnings per share (EPS) growth, contributing to its strong long-term performance. 
Over the past five years, BMI has delivered a total return of 151%, showcasing its ability to generate shareholder value despite short-term market fluctuations. 
Revenue forecasts for the upcoming quarters are optimistic, driven by increased adoption of water metering solutions and energy efficiency innovations. 
Comparing BMI to its industry peers like Watts Water Technologies (WTS) and Thermon Group (THR), BMI's growth potential in the smart water management space offers a compelling case. 
However, with options market activity suggesting possible significant movements in the stock, investors should remain cautious of potential volatility. 
 
Upcoming Earnings Report Summary: 
Badger Meter is set to release its third quarter 2025 financial results on October 21, 2025. 
Analyst consensus anticipates an earnings per share of $1.11 and revenue of $229.36 million, both marking increases from the same period last year. 
Historical performance indicates that the company has consistently met or exceeded expectations, which could positively impact the stock if this trend continues. 
The heightened focus on year-over-year earnings and revenue growth underscores investor optimism, although the absence of major company developments might moderate immediate impacts. 
 
Sector Performance: 
The Instruments-Control sector, to which Badger Meter belongs, has been buoyed by trends in industrial automation and energy efficiency. 
Companies within the sector, including BMI, are well-positioned to capitalize on these growing markets. 
While the sector has seen mixed performance, with some peers like Watts Water Technologies experiencing significant gains, Badger Meter's strategic positioning and innovation in water metering solutions provide a solid foundation for future growth. 
Nonetheless, the sector's overall performance remains subject to broader economic conditions and technological advancements, necessitating a watchful eye on market dynamics.

author: high_tech_texan
post:
$BMI Here’s a few reasons I like this right now. 
 
They’re making money - just not enough to satisfy some picky Wall Street types (or those with 1 hour or less time frames for their investments). I first bought too soon ($205) but averaged down recently - I’m close to “even” right now (1500 shares). 
 
They have a unique market niche and a diverse product line in an industry that is probably not going away soon. 
 
They’re an American company in an industry that can be helped, but likely not hurt by AI. 
 
Institutions own much of the float (not necessarily a huge positive, but I avoid anything that they own very little in). 
 
Executive compensation is high, but I’ve seen much worse). 
 
They have a healthy amount of job openings on their website.

author: DonCorleone77
post:
$BMI Badger Meter reports Q4 EPS 84c, consensus 82c 
 
Reports Q4 revenue $182.44M, consensus $182.32M. Kenneth Bockhorst, chairman, president and CEO, stated, "Our strong fourth quarter results capped off a stellar 2023 with continuing robust demand and operational execution. We delivered 24% sales growth in the fourth quarter with record operating profit margins of 17.6% and record cash flow. Shortly after year-end, we completed the tuck-in acquisition of select remote water monitoring assets, expanding the breadth of our smart water offerings in line with our strategic objectives. I want to thank the Badger Meter team for delivering another year of exceptional performance driven by their unrelenting commitment to our customers."

author: DonCorleone77
post:
$BMI $TRMB Badger Meter acquires water monitoring hardware and software from Trimble 
 
Badger Meter (BMI) has acquired select remote water monitoring hardware and software from Trimble (TRMB), inclusive of the Telog brand of RTUs - remote telemetry units - and Trimble Unity Remote Monitoring software. The acquisition provides real-time monitoring hardware and software targeted at distributed data collection for applications in water, wastewater, stormwater and environmental water monitoring.

author: WebChronicleToday
post:
$BMI New Press Release:  
  
Badger Meter Declares Regular Quarterly Dividend 
  
The Badger Meter, Inc. (NYSE:BMI) Board of Directors today declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.225 per share to shareholders of record on May 26, 2023, payable June 9, 2023. About Badger Meter With more than a century of water technology innovation, Badger Meter is a global provider of industry leading water solutions encompassing flow measurement, quality and other system parameters. These offerings provide our customers with the data and analytics essential to optimize their operations and contribute to the sustainable use and protection of the world’s most precious resource. $BMI New Press Release:  
  
Badger Meter Appoints Ms. Xia Liu to Its Board of Directors

Badger Meter Appoints Melanie K. Cook to Board of Directors 
  
Badger Meter, Inc. (NYSE:BMI) today announced that Melanie K. Cook, recently retired Chief Operating Officer of GE Appliances (a Haier Company) has been appointed to its Board of Directors. The appointment of Ms. Cook increases the size of the Board to ten members. During Ms. Cook’s nearly 30 years of global experience, she has held business unit leadership roles with full profit and loss responsibility in addition to roles in product lifecycle management, end-to-end supply chain, global sourcing, finance/audit, and acquisitions/dispositions, while delivering organic growth and driving digitization and transformational change. Item 1.01 Entry into a Material Definitive Agreement. On July 8, 2021, Badger Meter, Inc. (the "Company") entered into a five-year, $150 million multi-currency revolving credit facility that terminates on July 8, 2026 (the "New Facility"). The New Facility replaces in its entirety the Company's previous $125 million multi-currency revolving credit facility that was set to terminate on September 30, 2021. As of the date hereof, no amounts were outstanding under either facility.
